series_metadata.series_title: Auctioneer Program License Renewal and Change of Status Notifications
series_metadata.series_description: Renewal License Applications (e.g. Auctioneer, Apprentice Auctioneer, Auction Firm, Auctioneer: Corporation, LLC, Partnership, & Association; and Special Auctioneer) received under chapter 4707 may include but are not limited to police background check, application form, bond or irrevocable letter of credit, Ohio secretary of State certification, and notifications of change in license status (e.g. change of: name, sponsor, firm manager, address, license on deposit, and change or addition of dba).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: application or status change notification is received. ; Paper: application or status change notification is received
